clauses.obligation: License to operate single TeamLogic IT Business from single location in territory
clauses.renewal: 10-year terms; must sign then-current agreement (may be materially different)
clauses.exceptions: Coterminous terms required for multiple franchise purchases

clauses.obligation: Pay non-refundable initial franchise fee upon execution
clauses.exceptions: Refund if fail training (less direct costs, $2,500-$38,000 range)

clauses.obligation: Pay 7% of Gross Sales monthly; minimum $1,000/month after month 12
clauses.money: 7% of Gross Sales; $1,000/month floor after year 1
clauses.exceptions: Conversion franchisees: CFF waived on average existing Gross Sales for first 12 months

clauses.obligation: Pay greater of 1.2% of gross sales or $200/month to Ad Fund after first 12 months
clauses.exceptions: No fees first 12 months

clauses.obligation: Spend minimum $2,500/month for local marketing for length of contract
clauses.exceptions: First 12 months: 12-Month Initial Marketing Program at $2,000-$2,500/month

clauses.obligation: Purchase RMM agents from franchisor; maintain minimum 3 agents in business
clauses.exceptions: May request approval for equivalent tool; franchisor may require purchase from them

clauses.obligation: Maintain required hardware/software; use approved PSA (Autotask); pay technology fees
clauses.money: PSA $175-$225/mo; AV $1-$2; Office $35; Email $24/user; QB $100-$150; Automation $150; MFA $0-$30
clauses.exceptions: Hardware from any source; software vendors may change

clauses.obligation: Lease office space in territory; obtain franchisor site approval
clauses.duration: Must open within 90 days of signing (extension requires written approval)
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Complete initial training within 2 months; all owner-operators must attend
clauses.duration: Up to 6 days classroom + 26 hrs pre-opening + 61 hrs post-opening
clauses.money: Included in franchise fee for 2 people; $1,000 per additional person
clauses.exceptions: Second person has 1 year to attend (hotel at own expense after initial period)

clauses.obligation: Maintain Gross Sales >$2,500/week for 12 consecutive weeks
clauses.exceptions: First 12 months exempt

clauses.obligation: Maintain minimum 1 onsite qualified technician certified on RMM tools
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Adhere to Security Operations Guide; implement minimum security standards
clauses.duration: Entire term; standard may be modified
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Owner must directly supervise and participate in day-to-day operations
clauses.exceptions: May hire manager (must sign confidentiality; cannot work for competitor)

clauses.obligation: If entity, all owners and spouses must sign personal guarantee
clauses.money: Unlimited personal liability for all franchise agreement obligations
clauses.exceptions: None — spousal liability is a disclosed special risk

clauses.obligation: Maintain required insurance coverage with specified minimums
clauses.money: GL $1M/$3M; Auto $1M CSL; WC statutory; E&O+Cyber $1M ($2M when revenue >$1M)
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Authorize franchisor to debit bank account for all fees
clauses.money: All CFF, Ad Fund, RMM, and other fees
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Allow franchisor electronic access to operational data through PSA software
clauses.exceptions: No contractual limits on access; franchisor states will only use for business-related purposes

clauses.obligation: No competing business within 25 miles of former or any TLI business
clauses.exceptions: Subject to state law; CA generally unenforceable

clauses.obligation: No competing business within 25 miles; non-solicitation of clients
clauses.exceptions: Subject to state law; CA generally unenforceable; ND subject to Section 9-08 N.D.C.C.

clauses.obligation: Cease use of marks, website, phone numbers, intranet; pay debts; notify suppliers/clients
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Obtain franchisor approval for any transfer; meet conditions; pay $10,000 fee
clauses.trigger: Any transfer of franchise, assets, or ownership
clauses.exceptions: Family transfers waive fee if family member actively participated

clauses.obligation: Franchisor can match any offer for your business
clauses.trigger: Receipt of bona fide offer to purchase
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: All disputes must be arbitrated in Orange County, California
clauses.exceptions: Multi-state addendum overrides for 14 states; ND: no out-of-state arbitration; jury trial waiver deleted

clauses.obligation: No separate website without approval; no domain purchases to redirect traffic; all domains must be owned by franchisor
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Must offer Core Services; cannot offer unapproved products/services; no wholesale except to other TLI
clauses.exceptions: Non-Core Services allowed if brokered or performed by qualified technicians

clauses.obligation: Cure material breach within 20 days; cure monetary default within 20 days
clauses.exceptions: 3 defaults within 12 months = non-curable even if each was cured

clauses.obligation: Immediate termination without cure for specified defaults
clauses.trigger: Bankruptcy filing, felony conviction, false books, fraud, reputation impairment
clauses.exceptions: None

clauses.obligation: Agreement may only be modified by signed amendment, except franchisor may unilaterally revise Manuals
clauses.exceptions: Automatic conformance to state law
